examples.exam_en: He faced a powerful adversary in the final match.
She is a devoted admirer of Shakespeare.
She yearns for freedom every day.
He yearns for his mother abroad.
He yearned for adventure his whole life.
The parody was a travesty of the original play.
The verdict was a travesty of the law.
It was a travesty of justice when he was acquitted.
examples.exam_ko: 그가 무죄로 풀려난 것은 정의의 우롱이었다.

examples.exam_en: Officials tend to underestimate the unemployment problem.
examples.exam_ko: 관리들은 실업 문제를 경시하는 경향이 있다.

examples.exam_en: The figure of 20% may be an underestimate.
He worked hard to recoup his losses.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 손해를 만회하기 위해 열심히 일했다.

examples.exam_en: She rested to recoup her strength.
He made a rash decision without thinking.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 생각 없이 성급한 결정을 내렸다.

examples.exam_en: It would be rash of you to leave right now.
examples.exam_ko: 지금 당장 떠나는 것은 무모한 일이다.

examples.exam_en: He trusted in providence during hard times.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 힘든 시절에 신의 섭리를 믿었다.

examples.exam_en: He ordered a dozen raw oysters at the restaurant.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 식당에서 생 굴 열두 개를 주문했다.

examples.exam_en: A pearl oyster can take years to form a pearl.
examples.exam_ko: 진주 조개가 진주를 만드는 데 수년이 걸린다.

examples.exam_en: She solved the problem with great persistence.
Persistence is the road to accomplishment.
He tried to flatter her with compliments.
She flattered him about his singing talent.
Nobody trusted the deceitful person.
The company was fined for deceitful advertising.
examples.exam_ko: 그 회사는 기만적인 광고로 벌금을 맞았다.

examples.exam_en: He disguised himself with a false mustache.
They disguised him in woman's clothes to escape.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 도망치려고 그를 여자 옷으로 변장시켰다.

examples.exam_en: The old man walks with the aid of a cane.
examples.exam_ko: 그 노인은 지팡이를 짚고 걸어 다닌다.

examples.exam_en: The teacher used a cane to discipline students.
examples.exam_ko: 선생님은 학생들을 훈육하는 데 회초리를 사용했다.

examples.exam_en: Heat is convertible into electricity.
They used a convertible currency for the trade.
He asked an absurd question during class.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 수업 중에 어리석은 질문을 했다.

examples.exam_en: Don't be absurd and calm down.
The source of the absurd libel was never found.
examples.exam_ko: 그 터무니없는 명예훼손의 출처는 밝혀지지 않았다.

examples.exam_en: The disaster struck at an unprecedented scale.
The discovery was unprecedented in scientific history.
examples.exam_ko: 그 발견은 과학 역사상 전례가 없는 것이었다.

examples.exam_en: The baby wiggled her toes with joy.
They wiggle their hips to the pop music.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 팝 음악에 맞춰 엉덩이를 흔든다.

examples.exam_en: She let out a loud shriek in surprise.
He shrieked with terror at the sight.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 그 광경에 공포로 비명을 질렀다.

examples.exam_en: He tried to slash his wrists in despair.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 절망 속에 손목을 그으려 했다.

examples.exam_en: He slashed his way through the thick underbrush.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 칼로 빽빽한 덤불을 베며 나아갔다.
